name: RuneScape Metals + Woods
description: Mithril/adamantite/runite/dragon tier ladder above steel: ores, ingots, tools, armor, multiblock furnaces (Tier-2 Blast, Tier-3 Arc), and dragon-tier special attacks. Plus fletching: knife-cut arrow shafts, tiered short/longbows across six wood grades, and metal-tipped arrows up the full ladder. Optional Rune-Story integration: high-tier runic pickaxes when Rune-Story is loaded. Optional Primitive Survival integration: high-tier metal fishing hooks, lures, and spike-plate traps when Primitive Survival is loaded.
